# Test basic PostgreSQL server functionality
exec go run . --timeout=10s
stdin server_request.json
wait 10s
stdout '"method":"tools/list"'
stdout '"name":"list_tables"'
stdout '"name":"describe_table"'
stdout '"name":"execute_query"'
stdout '"name":"list_schemas"'

-- server_request.json --
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list"}
